variables.name: origin.ip
variables.description: The IP address of the origin

variables.name: origin.region_code
variables.description: The two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code of the origin

variables.name: origin.asn
variables.description: The Autonomous System Number of the origin

variables.name: request.headers
variables.description: The headers of the request, all header keys are lower-case

variables.name: request.method
variables.description: The HTTP method of the request, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, DELETE

variables.name: request.path
variables.description: The path of the request, e.g. /api/v1/users

variables.name: request.query
variables.description: The query string of the request, e.g. ?id=123&name=test

functions.name: inIpRange
functions.description: Check if an IP address is in a given IP range
